questions.hindi: प्रिय सर, आपके ईमेल के लिए धन्यवाद।
options: I need to know the time of the meeting.
I will not be able to attend this meeting.
Dear Sir, thank you for your email.
questions.answer: Dear Sir, thank you for your email.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "प्रिय सर, आपके ईमेल के लिए धन्यवाद।" = "Dear Sir, thank you for your email."

questions.sentence: I will not be _____ to attend this meeting.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I will not be able to attend this meeting."

questions.sentence: Please send me the report yesterday.
options: Please send me the report yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please send me the report."

options: Please take quick action on this matter.
This email is for important information.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं जल्द ही जवाब दूँगा।" = "I will reply soon."
Full sentence: "This email is for important information."
Correct sentence: "Please check the attachment."

options: Dear Sir, thank you for your email.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मुझे आपकी सहायता चाहिए।" = "I need your help."
Full sentence: "Thanks and regards."

questions.sentence: I am working on this project yesterday.
options: I am working on this project yesterday.
I am working on this project.
questions.answer: I am working on this project.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am working on this project."

options: I am on leave this week.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "कृपया इसे प्राथमिकता दें।" = "Please give this priority."
Full sentence: "I have read your message."

questions.sentence: I will reply by tomorrow yesterday.
options: I will reply by tomorrow yesterday.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will reply by tomorrow."

questions.hindi: यह ईमेल गलती से भेजा गया।
options: I hope you find this email helpful.
This email was sent by mistake.
questions.answer: This email was sent by mistake.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "यह ईमेल गलती से भेजा गया।" = "This email was sent by mistake."
Full sentence: "Please ignore this."

I need to know the time of the meeting.
questions.answer: I need to know the time of the meeting.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I need to know the time of the meeting."

options: I am on leave this week.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "कृपया कॉन्फ़्रेंस कॉल शेड्यूल करें।" = "Please schedule a conference call."
Full sentence: "I am on leave this week."

questions.sentence: Please take quick action on this matter yesterday.
options: Please take quick action on this matter yesterday.
Please take quick action on this matter.
questions.answer: Please take quick action on this matter.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please take quick action on this matter."

options: This email was sent by mistake.
I hope you find this email helpful.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "सादर, अनीता वर्मा।" = "Regards, Anita Verma."

questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I hope you find this email helpful."
